race.comment: HOME MISSILE (3) settled midfield then really got into his work late but missed by the barest margin on debut last start over 1100m at Goulburn. Nicely drawn and an extra 100m sets this up nicely. Unless a first starter jumps out of the ground he should be opening his account this afternoon. HEATHCLIFF (2) has not been produced since starting in the red only to finish a distant third on debut over this trip at Tamworth in December. Recent trial winner here so might have a bit more to offer this time in work. COUNT DU MONEY (5) debutant son of Wild Ruler from Wanted Lady who was purchased for AUD $ 200,000 (Magic Millions 2025 Gold Coast Yearling Sale). Impressing at the trials and can make an impact on debut. JOSAIN (9) daughter of Zousain from Jolie Brise on debut. Among the placings in a recent trial. Expected to go well.
